case_title: MARSTON, LEIGH ANNE et al vs. GONZALEZ, JOSE MARTIN et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARSTON, LEIGH ANNE MANCILLAS, GARY MARSTON, RICHARD MARSTON, BRITANY AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, JOSE MARTIN DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          FEB-16-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-20-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JAN-27-1994
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-16-1994, CONTINUED TO APR-18-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR DISMISSAL. PLAINTIFF TO GIVE NOTICE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-18-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JUL-18-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO SHOW CAUSE WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED PER CRC 525. HEARING SET FOR AUG-17-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
